user.title: AI DJ
user.description: Choose which LLM provider the DJ should use to pick music.

credentials.title: API credentials
credentials.description: Enter your API key. The default model is cheap and fast; you can change it here or later in the integration options. For an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, set the base URL (e.g. Groq https://api.groq.com/openai/v1, OpenRouter https://openrouter.ai/api/v1, DeepSeek https://api.deepseek.com/v1, or a local Ollama http://homeassistant.local:11434/v1).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the LLM API with these credentials. Check the API key and model name.
